scripts.test: node --test tests/core.test.js tests/app-contract.test.js tests/server.test.js tests/ai.test.js tests/naver-data.test.js tests/history.test.js tests/photo-vault.test.js
scripts.check: node --check core.js && node --check history.js && node --check photo-vault.js && node --check ai.js && node --check naver-data.js && node --check server.js && node --check app.js
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm test && npm run security:scan
